objective.request: Improve MPP research pipeline using recursive evidence planning

assumptions: Research may reveal constraints that change the downstream plan.
known_facts: Task entered MPP v3 research pipeline.
unknowns: Which sources are authoritative for this exact domain and task?
Which failure modes should block implementation?

query_plan.query: MetaBlooms MPP governance research Improve MPP research pipeline using recursive evidence planning official guidance standard best practices
MetaBlooms MPP governance research Improve MPP research pipeline using recursive evidence planning expert practice quality criteria
MetaBlooms MPP governance research Improve MPP research pipeline using recursive evidence planning common failures mistakes anti-patterns
MetaBlooms MPP governance research Improve MPP research pipeline using recursive evidence planning implementation validation schema testing

expansion_triggers: source quality is below required threshold
stop_conditions: minimum source count and domain diversity satisfied
recursion round limit reached and blocked receipt written

research_trigger.trigger_reason: MPP v3 requires planned SEE before evidence-dependent governance or implementation stages.

exclusion_rules: Exclude uncited SEO summaries when stronger sources exist.
Exclude stale sources when freshness is required and newer official sources exist.
